## Additional Context

Add any other context, research, or references about the module request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing modules to ensure this doesn't duplicate functionality
- [ ] I have considered the architectural implications
- [ ] I have considered security and compliance requirements
- [ ] I have researched similar solutions
- [ ] I have considered integration points

---

**Note**: Module requests will be evaluated based on:
- Business value and market demand
- Alignment with SARAISE architecture
- Resource availability
- Strategic priorities
